full_description: TravelPal is a travel companion app designed to help users plan and organize their trips efficiently. With TravelPal, you can create and manage your itinerary, research destinations, and stay up-to-date with real-time currency conversion. The app allows you to add flights, hotels, and activities to your itinerary and set reminders for important travel deadlines. Additionally, TravelPal provides a comprehensive destination guide with information on popular attractions, local customs, and safety tips. The real-time currency conversion feature enables you to easily convert currencies and make informed decisions about your travel budget. Whether you're a seasoned traveler or embarking on your first trip, TravelPal is the perfect companion to ensure a stress-free and enjoyable travel experience.
